new_constraint: The email must not include the purpose of the stay.

**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Room Availability – Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Reservation Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about the availability of guest rooms for the upcoming weekend, specifically for **[Insert Specific Dates]**.

Could you please provide details regarding pricing, cancellation policies, and floor plans for your current occupancy? I would appreciate a confirmation if you have inventory available for these dates.

Please let me know if any further information is required from my end.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<|im_end|>

**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Room Availability – Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Reservation Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about the availability of guest rooms for the upcoming weekend, specifically for **[Insert Specific Dates]**.

Could you please provide details regarding pricing, cancellation policies, and floor plans for your current occupancy? I would appreciate a confirmation if you have inventory available for these dates.

Please let me know if any further information is required from my end.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<|im_end|>
